name: Antigonus' Notebook
description: A leather notebook whose symbols seem to crawl when unobserved. Plainly a corrupting Beyonder artifact.

name: Spent Revolver
description: A service revolver, one chamber fired, the barrel still faintly warm.

name: The Wrong Reflection
description: The face in the mirror is not the one you remember wearing. You woke in a stranger's life.

name: Nighthawk's Warning
description: A Nighthawk admits the Church is already hunting the notebook — and you with it.
